text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I go to the cafeteria for my break and happen to see
Kawakami Princess's two friends.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't you think we should stop her?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're right... That's simply too much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I glance over to where the two are looking and see Kawakami
Princess. It seems like she's just relaxing with some tea...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ergh... Why're these little teacups so hard to hold? It's making my...
fingers tired...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ouch, that's hot! It's okay, just need to stay calm...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hooohohoho, there's nothing more princess-like than enjoying a nice
cup of tea in the afternoon!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is weird. She wasn't always like this, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's on her twentieth cup of tea. That much can't be good for
the body...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And she used to eat big, heaping plates of food. Now she barely eats
at all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I think she was saying that princesses are too elegant to eat more
than a handful of anything.
choice_data_list: (Elegant? That reminds me...)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that! She's elegant! That's what really makes a
princess—elegance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She admires King Halo's refined manners, but from what her friends
are saying, she might be taking things a little too far.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! Kawakami disappeared while we were standing here yappin'!
Where'd she go?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, who knows? We've got practice to get to, so let's have a talk with
her later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two move on with their day, but I'm starting to get more worried
than them.
choice_data_list:
Maybe I should look for her. I could ask what's
going on.

Maybe I should look for her. I could ask what's
going on.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urrrp... My stomach's about to burst...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I can't let a little hardship get me down! This is all part of a
princess's mission—for elegance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Erk... Ugh...
choice_data_list: Hi, mind if we chat a little?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Y-you've got it all wrong—I didn't puke! I managed to keep it
down!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wait, is that you, Trainer? Hello there... Ungh. Isn't it a nice day?
choice_data_list: No need to push yourself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: P-push myself? I'm just taking a nice, elegant walk, as princesses do.
choice_data_list: You don't have to try to be elegant all the time.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Try to be? W-wait, don't tell me you know!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You know I'm training myself to be elegant?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for losing my cool. I had no idea anyone would be able to
tell I was practicing.
choice_data_list: Practicing for what exactly?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course, to act in the proper, dignified manner of a princess.
You know, cause princesses have to be all graceful and elegant.
choice_data_list: Like King Halo?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I hit the nail on the head, but Kawakami suddenly seems
disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm so shocked someone found out... But you're right. I was practicing
so I could become like King.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've always looked up to how strong Princess Fighter is. Once I came
to the academy though, I met King Halo, and...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I realized a princess needs to be refined and graceful, like her! That's
why I'm going to follow her example, and—
choice_data_list: Wait, what example do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, like, she never goes up stairs two at a time, or chugs down fizzy
drinks, or eats from a giant bowl of food...
choice_data_list: How's that going?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's going... Actually, it's not going well at all. I don't feel even a tiny
bit like her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts are already coming up, but I wonder if someone like me
can really become a princess before then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see what she's worried about, but I'm starting to think it might not
be the best for her. How do I tell her that though?
choice_data_list:
Why don't we go see the real deal one more
time?

Why don't we go see the real deal one more
time?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm? Go see King? But I've already watched her a whole bunch.
choice_data_list: There's always something new you can learn.
There's always something new you can learn.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well, if you say so, I guess it might be good.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Exhale... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah! She really is wonderful! Just look at that dignified form—that
graceful movement!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Only King could run so elegantly! It's what a princess should be... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wow... She fell, but she's still going, even all covered in mud. How
noble, how beautiful...
choice_data_list: But she doesn't need to go that far, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course she does! She's determined to go as far as it takes to be
first-rate!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She has an unshakable ideal, no matter what other people might
think! That's why she's a bright, shining example of—oh.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I get it... The thing that makes her so dignified comes from the inside.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's why it was so hard for me. If I just copy how she moves, I'm still
empty on the inside...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's strange to see her this sad... Does she really think she's empty
inside?
choice_data_list:
I think you've simply lost sight of something
important.

I think you've simply lost sight of something
important.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's my dream—I'm the one who decides it, and I'm the one who will
achieve it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She knew exactly what her dream was back then.
choice_data_list:
Surely you have an ideal of your own to work
towards.

Surely you have an ideal of your own to work
towards.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Really? You mean I don't just have to copy Princess Fighter or King
Halo?
choice_data_list:
Don't rush it. It'll come if you think about it
carefully.

Don't rush it. It'll come if you think about it
carefully.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You're... right. I still have time before the tryouts.
choice_data_list: I'll be there to cheer you on.
I'll be there to cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess nods along, though she still seems uneasy
watching King Halo.
